title: feat(enter): add transaction history (compact on Pollen, full on Activity)
author: mahdiebene
pr_body_excerpt:
Fixes #11624

Adds a transaction history view that lists each billed Pollen request — when it happened, which API key and model were used, the source (tier/paid), and how much pollen was deducted.

### What
- New `TransactionHistory` component (`enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/activity/transaction-history.tsx`).
- Two render modes via a `mode` prop:
  - `compact` — last 5 rows + "View all →" link, mounted on the **Pollen** page in a "Recent transactions" section.
  - `full` — paginated 25-per-page with a **Load more** button, mounted on the **Activity** page in a "Transactions" section.
- Responsive: stacked cards on mobile (<sm), table on >=sm.
- Resolves API key UUIDs to human names using the existing `apiKeys` already loaded by the dashboard.

### Why this layout
Per [#11624](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/issues/11624) the existing Activity page already aggregates usage but doesn't show individual transactions. Putting the full list on Activity (alongside `UsageGraph`) keeps related data together; the compact preview on the Pollen page gives users a quick "did my last request go through?" check next to their balance.

### Data source
Calls the existing `apiClient.account.usage` endpoint — **no backend, schema, or new API surface**. Pagination uses the endpoint's `before` cursor.

### Diff size
3 files touched:
- `components/activity/transaction-history.tsx` (new)
- `components/activity/index.ts` (1 line — re-export)
- `routes/index.tsx` (import + 2 mount sites)

### Checks
- `npx biome check` passes on all changed files.
- `npx tsc --noEmit` passes for the `enter.pollinations.ai/frontend` project.
- Manually verified responsive breakpoints, empty state, error state, and Load-more pagination paths in the component logic.

Happy to iterate on copy, placement, or column choices.

gist.headline: Follow the pollen trail
gist.blurb: Added a new transaction history view to the dashboard. Now you can see exactly when, where, and how your Pollen is being used, right down to the API key and model.
gist.summary: Added a transaction history component to the dashboard that displays individual billed requests, including the API key, model, source, and deducted amount.
gist.impact: Users can now view their last 5 transactions directly on the Pollen page, or browse their complete paginated history on the Activity page.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an accountant or auditor, looking at a long paper receipt printing from a retro terminal. The receipt represents the transaction history.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, inspecting a long paper receipt printing from a retro computer monitor. The monitor screen glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) showing a neat ledger. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
